title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
text: Coursect is a startup company. Their aim is to bring AI tutoring to high school students unsing Open AI to generate questions. The AI is also used to correct the student answers with step to step walkthrough on how to solve each questions. When I was first was brought into this company it was running only using HTML and CSS. During my time here I showed the owner how we could make the the user experience better by using React.js as our front-end, Python Flask for our back-end, and other style sheets for styling the page such as SCSS. I also explain how React makes it easier to maintain and create code by building re-usable components that could be used in many pages of the project.

title: Truck Driver
text: In this role I deliver product for one of JB Hunt accounts to distributers that will then take this product and take them to different locations such as Walmart to be sold. Every delivery is very time sensitive and being on time is a must, which means that time management is a must. If a driver doesn't arrive by their appoiment time then the load must be returned back to warehouse which then must be shipped out again.

title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
text: I was hired by Modern-Tech to help get and complete contracts as a freelancer. A few of this contracts have been a online menu for a sushi restaurant, a SMS application for bussiness to be able to send out cupons to customers through text, and current we are working on a Yard Management System that will be tested and used by a fortune 300 company.
